zh.lifeSummary: 當John Davenport於1252年出生在英國爾達文波特時，他的父親Sir Roger Davenport27歲，母親Lady Mary Salemon24歲。他於大約1280年與Matilda de Rode在英國爾奧德 洛德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Davenport于1252年出生在英国爾達文波特时，他的父亲Sir Roger Davenport27岁，母亲Lady Mary Salemon24岁。他于大约1280年与Matilda de Rode在英国爾奧德 洛德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Davenport was born in 1252, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Roger Davenport, was 27 and his mother, Lady Mary Salemon, was 24. He married Matilda de Rode about 1280, in Odd Rode, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Davenport est né en 1252, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Davenport, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Salemon, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Matilda de Rode environ 1280, à Odd Rode, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Davenport 1252 in Davenport, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Davenport 27 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Salemon 24. Er hat um 1280 in Odd Rode, Cheshire, England Matilda de Rode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Davenport è nato il nel 1252 nel Davenport, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger Davenport, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Salemon, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Matilda de Rode circa 1280, nel Odd Rode, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: John Davenportが1252年にイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Davenportは27歳，母Lady Mary Salemonは24歳であった。約1280年にイギリスチェシュアイアオッド ロドでMatilda de Rodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Davenport(이)가 1252년 영국 체실르 대븐포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Davenport(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Salemon(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1280년 영국 체실르 오드 로드에서 Matilda de Rode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Davenport nasceu em 1252, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Davenport, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Salemon, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda de Rode aproximadamente 1280, em Odd Rode, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Davenport родился в 1252 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Davenport было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Salemon, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda de Rode около 1280 г. в местности одд род, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Davenport nació en 1252, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Davenport, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Salemon, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Matilda de Rode aproximadamente 1280, en Odd Rode, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija.
